qa_pairs.question: What is the typical format and appearance of an SSH public key?
qa_pairs.answer: An SSH public key typically appears as a very long single line, such as 'ssh-rsa AAAAB3NzaC1yc2EAAAADAQABAAACAQC3qeojDkUShnPTq9pI3cCZe+jgD6RKA/6CPsJIWZ8MqbX6wkk6 hHgKqKd2/9d7cj8e03Cfv4JLoD++P9fUPE3UyYrP/uVi4zytp5rmIZI4Qo1LvD1Obs0e78y0Dp7pfG1EHTYdn0p8 zHa0lNLOrZMmzDP0UMVdf4WKuv3Th2K/35yQ7DVIei6X/33Dcmsqd8bTXq7aFlw2y4sa/CHs314G6WYuJ9cTXtsW Dlc9oWJuOVqILJLeGQpl3BVEM9aKcYksqLMV1UlZF8bHbry0PKCnrJrNMzVulWfnmSOZ+lPcV32OsDRkFaKsdxPy'.
